title: morina alba
intro: Morina alba, also known as White Morina or Himalayan White Morina, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Morina alba include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Morina alba is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and it can also be used as a tincture or in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
